eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Sedgwick, CO; at 9:26 AM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 9:41 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: TEST Sedgwick County will be testing the tornado sirens in approx. 10 minutes. This is only a TEST.
